macro.title: Mortgage Rates to Fall as Cooler-Than-Expected Inflation Report Lowers Odds of a July Fed Rate Hike
macro.what: Takeaway: Rates will fall today after an unexpectedly soft CPI inflation reading that will keep the Fed from hiking at the July 29th meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: U.S. Pending Home Sales Rise to Highest Level in 6 Weeks
macro.what: Pending home sales ticked up as housing payments temporarily dipped down
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Compass files ethics complaints against Zillow in 26 states
housing.what: Compass filed ethics complaints alleging Zillow false advertising across 26 states, 55 MLSs and 30 Realtor associations.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: UWM broker ultimatum tied to 5 bps price drop at rivals
housing.what: United Wholesale Mortgage’s 2021 move to bar its broker partners from also sending loans to Rocket Mortgage drove an average price decrease of 5 basis points per loan at companies
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Zillow says conspiracy, MRED and Compass say Zillow did this to itself
housing.what: Zillow alleged a group boycott by MRED and Compass, while defendants argued Zillow’s harm is self-inflicted and nonmonopolistic.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Christy Soukhamneut on joining Stockton Mortgage as chief strategy and innovation officer
housing.what: Stockton Mortgage has appointed Christy Soukhamneut as chief strategy and innovation officer to lead operational transformation.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Cornerstone Capital Bank expands retail mortgage presence by adding Daryl Wizelman Team
housing.what: Cornerstone Capital Bank adds Daryl Wizelman and the Wizelman Team, expanding retail mortgage operations and leadership depth.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Ground leases taking root in affordable housing deals as costs rise
housing.what: Ground leases are emerging as gap capital for 4% LIHTC projects, with Safehold using 99-year terms and fixed 2% annual increases.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Taylor Morrison appoints Jeremy Hampson as Jacksonville division president
housing.what: Taylor Morrison named industry veteran Jeremy Hampson as president of its Jacksonville division as the builder expands its Esplanade brand.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Home Sellers Outnumber Buyers 2 to 1 in Miami, Nashville, and Much of Texas, The Nation’s Strongest Buyer’s Markets
housing.what: There were almost half a million more home sellers than buyers in the U.S
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Jim Dalrymple Joins Rocket as Principal of Industry Relations
housing.what: Rocket has hired Jim Dalrymple as principal of industry relations, a role focused on building relationships with MLSs, trade associations, brokerage leaders and technology partners across the housing industry
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Hit All-Time High, Driven in Part By Big Upticks in San Francisco and West Palm Beach
housing.what: Prices rose 2.2% year over year in June to a record high, mainly because of growing demand
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

notables.title: NTREIS names Joey Bandemer VP of data governance
notables.what: NTREIS hired Joey Bandemer to lead data governance and in house compliance, replacing 13 associations, rollout Q4 2026.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Bank regulators issue guidance on credit risk for unauthorized workers
notables.what: The OCC, FDIC and NCUA reminded lenders to manage credit risk for borrowers without work authorization under existing rules.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: The brokerage blueprint is changing. Keller Williams just proved it with the JMG acquisition
notables.what: Keller Williams agreed to acquire Jason Mitchell Group, adding a lead network model as analysts cite possible IPO preparation.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
